evals.prompt: Design a 7-email welcome sequence for new subscribers
evals.expected_output: A complete 7-email welcome sequence with timing, subject lines, and content direction for each email. Should progress from lead magnet delivery through trust-building to an offer. Should include send timing recommendations and general platform guidance.

assertions.name: has_seven_emails
assertions.description: Outlines all 7 emails with distinct purposes and content direction for each

assertions.name: has_timing
assertions.description: Specifies send timing or delay between each email in the sequence

assertions.name: has_subject_lines
assertions.description: Provides subject line suggestions for at least the first few emails in the sequence

evals.prompt: My open rates dropped from 25% to 12% over the last 3 months — help
evals.expected_output: Diagnosis of likely root causes for declining open rates with a specific recovery plan. Should cover list hygiene, segmentation by engagement, sender reputation, and re-engagement strategy.

assertions.name: diagnoses_root_cause
assertions.description: Identifies likely causes such as sending to unengaged subscribers, list hygiene issues, or sender reputation decline

assertions.name: has_recovery_plan
assertions.description: Provides a step-by-step plan to recover open rates including segmentation and re-engagement tactics

assertions.name: references_benchmarks
assertions.description: References healthy open rate benchmarks to contextualize the problem and set a recovery target

evals.prompt: How do I set up abandoned cart emails in Groove?
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guidance for setting up an abandoned cart email sequence in GrooveMail triggered by GrooveSell events. Should cover timing, email content strategy, and exit conditions.

assertions.name: groove_specific
assertions.description: Provides guidance specific to Groove.cm (GrooveMail and GrooveSell) rather than generic advice

assertions.name: has_email_sequence
assertions.description: Outlines a multi-email cart abandonment sequence with timing for each email

assertions.name: has_exit_conditions
assertions.description: Mentions removing or suppressing subscribers from the sequence when they complete the purchase
